sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96791" key="stigmatofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στιγ-μᾰτοφόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n96791.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bearing tattoo-marks</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:1:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.24</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στιγματηφορέω</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
